race.name: L'Etape Costa Rica by Tour de France
race.display_name: L'Etape Costa Rica by Tour de France
race.tagline: 130km of volcanic fury near Irazú—Tour de France spirit ignites Central America's savage climbs!

vitals.field_size: Hundreds expected in Central America's Tour de France amateur showdown
vitals.registration: Pre-registration locks lowest fees until Sept 2025; includes official jersey and Tour-level access
vitals.feed_zones: Multiple food/drink stations mirroring Tour de France support
vitals.cutoff_time: TBD; self-paced amateur challenge with flexible finishes
route_options: Ride: ~52km, ~1,700ft — gentler intro to volcanic vibes

climate.primary: Tropical highland — humid heat with afternoon storms
climate.description: August brings warm days around 75-85°F in Cartago's highlands, laced with high humidity from nearby rainforests. Expect morning clarity giving way to potential showers near Irazú. Riders battle sweat-soaked suffering amid lush volcanic backdrops.

terrain.primary: Volcanic paved climbs with Tour pedigree
terrain.surface: Smooth Costa Rican pavement snakes through lush highlands, freshly tarmacked in key sectors for pro-level speed. Expect grippy asphalt hugging Irazú's flanks, with minimal gravel threats. Road closures ensure pure, traffic-free flow.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 76. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 73.

course_description.character: Paved volcanic rollercoaster from Cartago shadows Irazú's brooding mass—steep ramps pierce cloud forests, descents carve lush canyons. Race route doubles down on climbs for Tour-true brutality; Ride eases in. Closed roads let amateurs chase polka-dots amid jungle roars.
course_description.signature_challenge: Irazú Volcano ascent—2,500m cumulative near 11,000ft peak redefines tropical climbing. Pavement belies the hypoxic punch; foggy rims and jungle heat forge Tour legends from amateurs.

logistics.airport: Fly into SJO (Juan Santamaría, 45min north); shuttle or rent car to Cartago. Domestic SJO-Cartago flights rare—drive the Pan-Am for scenery.
logistics.lodging_strategy: Book Cartago fincas or hotels early; aim highland spots near start. Airbnb gems abound—volcano views beat sterile chains.
logistics.food: Tico gallo pinto fuels mornings; post-ride casados and imperials await. Event aid mirrors Tour; hydrate against humidity.

history.origin_story: Born 2023 to export Tour de France amateur magic to Central America. Targets Costa Rica's volcanic wilds near Irazú for ultimate sufferfest. Debuted massively with 2025 edition, cementing as region's premier cycling showdown. Pre-2026 hype exploded post-launch.
notable_moments: Irazú routes teased for pro-am pain
history.reputation: Instant buzz as Tour's tropical outpost—prestige-soaked rookie drawing global eyes. Riders rave volcanic beauty meets Series pro-standards. Poised for iconic status.

biased_opinion.summary: L'Etape Costa Rica blasts Tour de France fever into Irazú's fiery jaws—rookie guts with pro polish. 130km of paved pain amid jungle drama crushes souls while jerseys crown kings. Central America's answer to Alps envy: cheaper, wilder, sweatier. Debut vibes scream breakout star; skip if you fear humidity hell.
biased_opinion.bottom_line: Premier Central Am gran fondo with Tour DNA—jump in early for founding glory. Prestige elevates it beyond regional rivals. Bucket-list no-brainer for climb chasers.

final_verdict.one_liner: Tour spirit erupts on Irazú—rookie rocket with global glow
final_verdict.should_you_race: Yes if you crave Tour jerseys amid volcanoes and tropical chaos—perfect for adventure roadies. Skip if humidity horrors or logistics laziness plague you; wait for 2027 maturity.
final_verdict.alternatives: L'Etape Slovenia for Euro climbs (letape-slovenia); La Ruta for MTB brutality (la-ruta); Costa Rica gravel fests for dirt twists

youtube_data.search_query: L'Etape Costa Rica by Tour de France gran fondo cycling Cartago

videos.title: Experience L’Étape Costa Rica by Tour de France 2025 🚴✨
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
Cyclists conquered Costa Rica’s volcanic landscapes from Cartago to the Orosi Valley, fueled by sprints, climbs, and the Tour de France spirit.

---------

L'Etape Series is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France series”, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 22 international locations including:

🇫🇷 France
🇧🇷 Brazil
🇧🇬 Bulgaria
🇨🇷 Costa Rica
🇨🇿 Czech Republic
🇩🇰 Denmark
🇪🇨 Ecuador
🇺🇸 United States
🇬🇷 Greece
🇦🇪 United Arab Emirates
🇮🇪 Ireland
🇮🇹 Italy
🇲🇽 Mexico
🇵🇱 Poland
🇷🇴 Romania
🇸🇰 Slovakia
🇸🇮 Slovenia
🇹🇼 Taiwan
🇹🇷 Turkey


Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 45 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapeseries.com for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/letapeseries/
-Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/letapeseries/
